transcript: Uh, Mick... Mick, this is Mr. McGovern.
Yeah. Uh... r... uhm... I was... in receival of one of your newsletters, um, one of your little pamphlets, or something.
I was wondering-- [beep] --uh, could you tell me a little more about, um... your, uh... exodus to the Dominican Republic, as it was.
"Exodus to the Dominican Republic". Yes, so... Mr. McGovern, wasn't your name something else last time?
Di... didn't I talk to you about a week ago... '[beep]' ...and you had a different name?
Um, uh... this is the first time I've phoned ya, I'm calling from Grand Junction, at this point.
Grand Junction? No, I'm quite... confident I talked to you about a week ago. Same guy, different name.
No, I'm sorry, I don't believe that's, uh... a correct assumption... on your behalf... [beep] ...actually.
No, I'm afraid not, sir. Uh... is that... is that... okay? Is that biodegradable? [unclear]
Oh... well... uh... no, I, uh... I'm sure I talked to you. Filled you in at that time on everything.
Uh, so you... so you could just lay it on the line at that point.
Yeah. You just laid it out very clear for everyone. Um... I was wondering if you have any more... more, um... snow camps, going to be made available?
No, not this year... uh, you know, snow's pretty much over.
Uh... what do you do in those?
Snow-- '[beep]' --camps, we usually do in the fall.
Uh... do what, was my question.
What... when do we do, or what do we do in snow...?
What do you do in them?
What do we do in them?
Oh, just a weekend deal. Go up there, have a big Young Life's-- '[beep]' --club, little competitive deals in the morning. [unintelligible]
Are jigsaws made available to the kids?
Jigsaws? [laughs] Uh-oh, here we go again. No.
Is it alright to panel... panel the students?
Do the students learn paneling, while they're up there?
Hey, how come you get to ask all the questions? What's the little beep thing?
Sir, I'm just trying to... to... you know, just, I'm very gratified with your program.
I believe it's very equitable in the long run... you know, is my... 's my stance... on your business.
Hey, well, that's great. We're glad to hear that.
You know, there's all kind of political orientation affiliated with your business.
Oh, I didn't know... I didn't... I guess I hadn't thought a lot about that.
I... I've heard a lot of people that correlate you with cheetah.
Chee... [laughs] Ahh, gosh. Hey, how come you hung up last time?
Ohh, that's what the beep is.
Is there some sort of granola cereal that goes with your program? That's made available to the... kids?
Um... I was wondering if you have any more... more, um... snow camps, going to be made available?
No, not this year... uh, you know, snow's pretty much over.
